story.heading:
Kept in touch
during the pandemic
story.body: When the world slowed down, we didn't. Late-night calls and care packages kept us close across the distance.

story.heading:
Reconnected
in the Poconos
story.body: A weekend in the mountains turned into something neither of us expected — the start of everything.

story.heading:
Got engaged in
Hudson, NY
story.body: Overlooking the river, on a perfect autumn afternoon, Matt asked the question. Sarah said yes.

story.heading:
Sarah moved to
Massachusetts
story.body: New city, new chapter. Boxes and furniture and a lot of excited energy for what comes next.

story.heading: More to come
story.body: The story keeps writing itself. Stay tuned for what happens next.

story.heading:
August 28th,
Lancaster PA
story.body: Friends, family, and everyone we love gathered in one place to celebrate with us. We can't wait.

celebration.heading: Our Celebration
celebration.description: Join us as we celebrate in the heart of Lancaster County. We can't wait to share this day with you!
celebration.eventDetails: A cocktail hour and reception will follow the ceremony. More details to come — check back closer to the date.

infoRows.label: Weather & Attire
infoRows.body: August in Lancaster is warm and humid — expect highs around 85°F. We suggest semi-formal attire and comfortable shoes for the outdoor ceremony.

infoRows.label: Transportation & Parking
infoRows.body: Free street parking is available near the venue. We'll share shuttle information closer to the date for guests staying downtown.

infoRows.label: Logistics & Accessibility
infoRows.body: Excelsior is fully accessible. If you have any questions or need accommodations, please reach out and we'll be happy to help.

travel.heading: Travel & Stay
travel.body: Lancaster is a beautiful destination with plenty to explore. Here are our recommendations to make your visit memorable.

whereToStay.heading:
Lancaster Marriott
at Penn Square
whereToStay.body: Centrally located with easy access to restaurants and shopping. Modern amenities and comfortable rooms in the heart of the city.

whereToStay.heading: Cork Factory Hotel
whereToStay.body: Unique boutique hotel in a historic brick building. Walking distance to local attractions and the best downtown dining.

whereToStay.heading: Fulton Steamboat Inn
whereToStay.body: Distinctive hotel with steamboat-themed rooms. Family-friendly with plenty of amenities and a memorable stay.

whereToStay.heading: The Warehouse Hotel
whereToStay.body: A beautifully converted historic warehouse with a modern, local vibe. Great for extended stays and exploring the city.

whereToEat.heading: Central Market
whereToEat.body: America's oldest continuously operating farmers market. Perfect for breakfast or lunch with dozens of local vendors under one roof.

whereToEat.heading: The Belvedere Inn
whereToEat.body: Upscale dining in a gorgeous Victorian mansion. Perfect for a special dinner out with an impressive wine list.

whereToEat.heading: Luca
whereToEat.body: Contemporary American cuisine with rotating seasonal menus. Outstanding cocktails and a warm, lively atmosphere.

whereToEat.heading:
Shady Maple
Smorgasbord
whereToEat.body: A massive Pennsylvania Dutch buffet and a true Lancaster County institution. Don't miss it.

whereToEat.heading: Prince Street Cafe
whereToEat.body: A beloved neighborhood cafe with exceptional coffee and fresh pastries. The ideal spot for a slow morning.

whereToEat.heading:
Kitchen Kettle
Village
whereToEat.body: A charming village complex with restaurants, jams, and local crafts. Great for browsing and a laid-back lunch.

activities.heading: Amish Farm Tours
activities.body: Experience authentic Amish culture with guided tours of working farms and the beautiful Lancaster countryside.

activities.heading: Strasburg Rail Road
activities.body: America's oldest operating railroad. Take a scenic steam-powered train ride through Amish farmland and rolling hills.

activities.heading: Long's Park
activities.body: A beautiful public park perfect for walking, picnics, and summer concerts. Peaceful and family-friendly.

activities.heading:
Landis Valley Village
& Farm Museum
activities.body: A living history museum showcasing Pennsylvania German rural life, trades, and traditions across 100 acres.

activities.heading:
Arts & Shopping
Downtown
activities.body: Explore galleries, boutiques, antique shops, and Lancaster's vibrant arts scene — all walkable from the center.

activities.heading:
Kitchen Kettle
Village
activities.body: Beyond dining — shop for locally made goods, watch artisan demonstrations, and soak in the countryside charm.

rsvp.heading: Let us know if you can make it
rsvp.body: We'd love to know if you can make it. Please RSVP by June 1, 2026 so we can plan accordingly.

registry.heading: Registry
registry.body: Your presence is the greatest gift, but if you wish to celebrate with us, we've registered at the following:

items.name: Zola
items.description: Our honeymoon fund and curated picks.
